moments.title: Hampton Court Palace Festival Continues
moments.blurb: The Hampton Court Palace Festival runs until June 19, featuring iconic artists like David Gray, OMD, Pete Tong Ibiza Classics, and Nile Rodgers & CHIC.

angles.name: Still time to catch
angles.copy: Still time to catch some incredible artists at Hampton Court Palace Festival this week! Who are you hoping to see?

angles.name: Nile Rodgers & CHIC
angles.copy: Get ready for disco funk royalty! Nile Rodgers & CHIC hit the Hampton Court Palace Festival stage this week. Pure groove.

angles.name: Pete Tong Ibiza Classics
angles.copy: Pete Tong's Ibiza Classics are bringing the rave to Hampton Court Palace Festival! Expect orchestral anthems under the stars.

moments.title: Download Festival Wrap-Up
moments.blurb: Download Festival, the UK's premier rock event at Donington Park, concluded on June 14, leaving thousands of rock and metal fans buzzing.

angles.name: Post-Download Blues
angles.copy: Still buzzing from Download Festival? What was your highlight from the weekend at Donington Park?

angles.name: Download Memories
angles.copy: The dust has settled on another epic Download Festival! Share your favourite moments and mosh pit memories.

moments.title: Paul McCartney turns 84
moments.blurb: Legendary Beatles co-founder Paul McCartney celebrates his 84th birthday on June 18, continuing his incredible legacy in music.

angles.name: Happy 84th Paul
angles.copy: Sir Paul McCartney turns 84 on Thursday! What's your all-time favourite track from the living legend?

angles.name: McCartney's Enduring Influence
angles.copy: From The Beatles to Wings and beyond, Paul McCartney's influence is unmatched. Celebrating his 84th on June 18th!

moments.title: Isle of Wight Festival Kicks Off
moments.blurb: The iconic Isle of Wight Festival returns from June 18-21, promising a weekend of diverse music and festival vibes.

angles.name: IOW Fest is HERE!
angles.copy: The Isle of Wight Festival kicks off this Thursday! Who's heading to Seaclose Park for a legendary weekend?

angles.name: Festival Countdown
angles.copy: Counting down the days to Isle of Wight Festival! Get ready for four days of incredible music and unforgettable moments.

moments.title: TRNSMT Festival in Glasgow
moments.blurb: Glasgow Green hosts the TRNSMT Festival from June 19-21, bringing a massive lineup to Scotland for a weekend of live music.

angles.name: TRNSMT incoming!
angles.copy: Glasgow, get ready! TRNSMT Festival takes over Glasgow Green this weekend. Who's on your must-see list?

angles.name: Scotland's Big Weekend
angles.copy: TRNSMT Festival is almost here! Three days of epic music in Glasgow. What tunes are you hoping to hear live?

moments.title: Parklife Festival in Manchester
moments.blurb: Parklife Festival hits Manchester's Heaton Park on June 20-21, delivering a huge weekend of diverse musical acts.

angles.name: Parklife Weekend
angles.copy: Heaton Park is about to come alive! Parklife Festival takes over Manchester this weekend. Who's got their tickets ready?

angles.name: Manchester's Festival
angles.copy: The countdown to Parklife is ON! Get ready for two days of incredible music and good vibes in Manchester.

moments.title: Lionel Richie turns 77
moments.blurb: Soul and R&B icon Lionel Richie celebrates his 77th birthday on June 20, known for hits with The Commodores and his solo career.

angles.name: Happy 77th Lionel
angles.copy: Can you believe Lionel Richie turns 77 this Saturday? Celebrate with us by sharing your favourite Commodores or solo track!

angles.name: Hello Lionel
angles.copy: Is it 'Hello' you're looking for? Lionel Richie celebrates his 77th birthday this weekend! What's your go-to Lionel ballad?

moments.title: Lana Del Rey turns 41
moments.blurb: American singer-songwriter Lana Del Rey, known for her melancholic and cinematic style, celebrates her 41st birthday on June 21.

angles.name: Happy 41st Lana
angles.copy: Happy 41st birthday to the one and only Lana Del Rey this Friday! What's your favourite track from the 'Queen of Sadcore'?

angles.name: Lana's Vibe
angles.copy: Celebrating Lana Del Rey's 41st birthday on June 21st! Her unique sound continues to captivate. What's your favourite album?

moments.title: Summer Solstice - Longest Day
moments.blurb: The Summer Solstice, marking the longest day of the year in the Northern Hemisphere, falls on June 21, officially welcoming summer.

angles.name: Longest Day
angles.copy: Get ready for the Summer Solstice this Friday – the longest day of the year! How will you make the most of the extra daylight?

angles.name: Hello Summer
angles.copy: Officially welcoming summer this Friday with the Summer Solstice! Time for longer evenings and warmer vibes.

moments.title: Cyndi Lauper turns 73
moments.blurb: The flamboyant pop icon Cyndi Lauper, famous for 'Girls Just Want to Have Fun' and 'True Colors', celebrates her 73rd birthday on June 22.

angles.name: Happy 73rd Cyndi
angles.copy: Girls (and boys) just want to celebrate! Cyndi Lauper turns 73 this Sunday. What's your favourite track from the 80s legend?

angles.name: True Colors
angles.copy: Celebrating the incredible Cyndi Lauper's 73rd birthday on June 22nd! Her music and style are truly iconic.

moments.title: Tribute to Kris Kristofferson
moments.blurb: Remembering the legendary singer-songwriter and actor Kris Kristofferson, who would have been 90 on June 22. He passed away in September 2024.

angles.name: Remembering Kris
angles.copy: On June 22nd, we remember the incredible Kris Kristofferson, who would have been 90. A true outlaw country legend.

angles.name: Kristofferson's Legacy
angles.copy: Remembering Kris Kristofferson, who would have been 90 this Sunday. His songwriting gifted us classics like 'Me and Bobby McGee'.

moments.title: Tribute to George Michael
moments.blurb: Remembering the iconic British singer-songwriter George Michael, who would have been 63 on June 25. He passed away in December 2016.

angles.name: Remembering George
angles.copy: On June 25th, we remember the one and only George Michael, who would have been 63. His incredible music lives on.

angles.name: Wham! to Solo Star
angles.copy: From Wham! to global solo superstar, George Michael's talent was undeniable. Remembering him on what would have been his 63rd birthday.

moments.title: Ariana Grande turns 33
moments.blurb: Pop superstar Ariana Grande, known for her powerful vocals and chart-topping hits, celebrates her 33rd birthday on June 26.

angles.name: Happy 33rd Ariana
angles.copy: Happy 33rd birthday to the incredible Ariana Grande on June 26th! What's your favourite track from the pop queen?

angles.name: Ariana's Hits
angles.copy: Celebrating Ariana Grande's 33rd birthday next week! From 'Thank U, Next' to '7 Rings', her hits keep coming.

moments.title: Blenheim Palace Festival Upcoming
moments.blurb: The inaugural Blenheim Palace Festival kicks off on June 27, featuring stars like Katy Perry, Alanis Morissette, and Michael Bublé.

angles.name: Blenheim Festival Preview
angles.copy: Get ready for the first-ever Blenheim Palace Festival starting June 27! A stunning setting for incredible artists.

angles.name: Katy Perry & Alanis
angles.copy: Katy Perry and Alanis Morissette are heading to Blenheim Palace Festival from June 27th! Who are you excited to see?
